reason: Three head-and-shoulders views (profile, front, three-quarter) of one consistent Filipina woman reading clearly as early-50s: forehead/nasolabial lines, slight under-eye softness, grey-streaked dark hair. Identity holds across all three views. Rimless glasses rendered cleanly, neat low ponytail with grey streaks, navy blazer over light-blue shirt with a navy ID lanyard at the neck. Neutral measured expression, plain mid-grey studio background, even lighting. Photoreal DAZ/CGI, not 2D. No melted/extra features, no extra limbs, glasses clean. Lanyard ID card text is gibberish but that is a non-load-bearing background detail and does not affect usability as an identity anchor. On-spec and usable.
